meta.title: International Committee on Systematics of Prokaryotes; Subcommittee on the taxonomy of Flavobacterium and Cytophaga-like bacteria: Minutes of the meetings, 26 July 2005, San Francisco, CA, USA
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml:
Minute 4. Minutes of the previous meetings.
The minutes of the last meetings, which were held on 30 July 2002 in Paris, France, had been approved by mail and published [Bernardet, Int J Syst Evol Microbiol 54 (2004), 285287]. Reprints were distributed by J.-F. Bernardet to the members present.
